items: Welcome by the School Board President, Alisa MacAvoy
Additions, Deletions or Modifications to the agenda.

If you have public comment related to a Regular Board Meeting item, please post it on: (https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSd3rKbPfVCTpOsK5ILqjnU2u-h- NuNx-vUq4OZxYNVR8lc4aQ/viewform?usp=sf_link) prior to the Regular Board Meeting or immediately upon the meeting opening.

llmResponse.agenda_changes: Multiple changes announced at start of meeting: Items 7.1, 7.2, 7.3 moved to consent; 10.1 (grand jury response) moved to consent; continuation of study session moved to after 8.2 as new item 8.2A or 8.3
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: Roll call vote, please. Trustee Wells. Aye. Trustee Lawson. Aye. Tracy Marquez. Aye. Vice President Diasokum. Aye. President Macavoy. Aye.

items.intro_words: All right, roll call, please. Trustee Wells. Here. Trustee Lawson. Present.
Let's see. Vien venidos. Si necesita interpretacion en espanol, por favor.
All right, do I have any changes to the agenda? I have one three proposed changes.
All right, I do not see any oral communication comments. All right, so we're on to the bond program consent items.
All right, 7.4. Does anyone have any questions on this resolution?
Right, okay, so we're on to 8.1. Discussion of reconvening North Star Forward Committee. Yes, we are.
Right, okay, so we're on to the bond program consent items. Do I have a motion to approve?
So I think we're ready to go to the next one then. Thank you. Great. So the second.the second. This item 8.4 is regarding staff development.
Okay. And the next one goes hand in hand as well. This is 8.7. This is really a new policy once again,
